summary: 34 Dart source files verified across models (ConnectionProfile, Snippet, SftpFile, TerminalTab, AppSettings, HostInfo), services (database, secure_storage, ssh, sftp, webdav_sync), providers (Riverpod state management), screens (home, terminal, sftp, settings, snippets, about, master_password), widgets (host_info_bar, virtual_keyboard_bar, file_list_tile, connection_edit_dialog), constants (colors, styles), and utils (theme, file_utils). pubspec.yaml with all required dependencies. README.md documenting the project.
